currentFAQs.q: How much does a plumber cost in {{CITY}}?
currentFAQs.a: Plumber rates in {{CITY}} typically range from $85-$150/hour. Total project costs depend on the scope — a simple drain cleaning may cost $200-$450 while a water heater replacement runs $1,500-$4,500.

currentFAQs.q: Should I repair or replace my water heater?
currentFAQs.a: If your water heater is over 10 years old or the repair cost exceeds 50% of replacement, replacing is usually the better investment. Tankless water heaters last 20+ years and can reduce energy costs.

currentFAQs.q: Is PEX or copper better for repiping?
currentFAQs.a: PEX is 30-40% cheaper than copper and faster to install. Copper lasts longer (50+ years vs 25-30 for PEX) and has higher resale value. Both are code-compliant in most areas.

proposedFAQs.note: freezeRisk is plumbing-specific. For warm-climate cities the answer becomes 'minimal' which is still city-distinct vs. cold-climate cities.
